title: Shorten congress debate prompts to 3-5 sentences

log.context: Shorten congress debate prompts to 3-5 sentences

No changes needed in `temporal-workflows` — confirmed.

Here is a summary of what was done:

**File changed:** `/mnt/data/hello-world/serve.py`

**Two edits made:**

1. **`LLM_MAX_TOKENS`** (line 41): Raised from `300` to `600`. The old 300-token hard cap was too tight to allow Ibrahim's 5-8 sentence synthesis without truncation.

2. **`_handle_congress_post` user_message prefix** (lines 1397-1408): The old single-instruction `"Respond in 3 sentences maximum. Be direct and sharp — no padding, no...(truncated)
